About the Firm

Shaping Mumbai's
built future since 2019

Daksh Hirani and Associates Pvt. Ltd. is a multidisciplinary consultancy serving as a single-window partner for co-operative housing societies and developers — covering feasibility, architecture, regulatory liaisoning and project management under one roof.

Read our full story →

What We Do

Four services, one firm

Each capability stands on its own — explore the dedicated page for process, scope and FAQs.

Redevelopment Consultancy
Feasibility studies, tender preparation, comparative charts, developer selection.

Architecture Services
Concept design, working drawings, approval drawings for residential and commercial.
Explore →
Liaisoning & Approvals
BMC, MHADA, SRA, MMRDA approvals, Fire and Airport NOC, OC/CC processing.
Explore →
PMC Services
Quality control, cost monitoring, vendor management, construction supervision.

Why Choose Us

A single window, not five vendors

One Point of Contact
No coordinating between separate architects, liaison agents and PMC firms.
Regulatory Depth
Direct, working experience across BMC, MHADA, SRA and MMRDA jurisdictions.
Member-First Process
Clear member presentations and comparative tender charts, not opaque shortlists.
Tracked Delivery
From first submission to occupation certificate, on a published timeline.
